scripts.dev: concurrently "bun run dev:engine" "bun run dev:arena" "bun run dev:web"
scripts.dev:engine: cd apps/engine && uv run uvicorn main:app --reload --port 8000
scripts.lint: bun lint:engine && bun lint:arena && bun lint:web
scripts.lint:engine: cd apps/engine && uv run ruff check .
scripts.lint:arena: cd apps/arena && bun lint && bun format
scripts.lint:web: cd apps/web && bun lint && bun format
scripts.type: bun type:engine && bun type:arena && bun type:web
scripts.type:engine: cd apps/engine && uv run ty check .
